title: return all inspect info for varlink containerinspect
body:
when obtaining the inspect information for a container through varlink, we need
to extract more container related information by parsing the data through the
method 'GetCtrInspectInfo' which was previously only in podman's main.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @jwhonce this should fix the label issue I was seeing.  once it is in, i'll validate the pythoon side looks good.

The change LGTM.  Just wonder if it would make sense to move the functionality from podman to some more central shared util type of location and let both batchcontainer and podman call it from there.  Just a thought.

@baude eg_inspect_fedora.py displays all the image and container inspect results.

TBM -- https://github.com/projectatomic/libpod/pull/870

@TomSweeneyRedHat It looks to me like podman is already calling it from batchcontainer?
@rh-atomic-bot r+
